allow: Bash(# Restart app fresh adb shell am force-stop com.mechanicshop.app && sleep 1 adb shell am start -n com.mechanicshop.app/.MainActivity && sleep 5 # Tap ""Sign in with Email"" \(lower on screen, around y=1350\) echo ""Tapping Sign in with Email..."" adb shell input tap 540 1350 && sleep 2 # Check if email field appeared by taking screenshot adb shell screencap -p /sdcard/screen.png && adb pull /sdcard/screen.png /tmp/screen.png # Now enter email in the field \(should be around y=1000 after expansion\) echo ""Entering email..."" adb shell input tap 540 1050 && sleep 0.5 adb shell input text ""test@mechanic.app"" && sleep 1 # Hide keyboard and tap password field adb shell input keyevent 4 && sleep 0.5 adb shell input tap 540 1200 && sleep 0.5 echo ""Entering password..."" adb shell input text ""Test1234!"" && sleep 1 # Hide keyboard adb shell input keyevent 4 && sleep 0.5 # Tap Sign In button \(should be around y=1350\) echo ""Tapping Sign In..."" adb shell input tap 540 1380 && sleep 5 # Check results echo ""Checking logs..."" adb logcat -d)

Bash(# Start the app adb shell am start -n com.mechanicshop.app/.MainActivity && sleep 6 # Dump UI to find elements adb shell uiautomator dump /sdcard/ui.xml && adb pull /sdcard/ui.xml /tmp/ui.xml # Search for relevant UI elements grep -o ''text=""[^""]*""'' /tmp/ui.xml)

Bash(# Scroll down to reveal Complete Setup button adb shell input swipe 540 1800 540 1200 300 && sleep 0.5 && adb shell uiautomator dump /sdcard/ui19.xml && adb pull /sdcard/ui19.xml /tmp/ui19.xml && grep -oE ''content-desc=""Complete Setup""|bounds=""\\[[^""]+\\]""'' /tmp/ui19.xml)
